LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC., AND ABDULRAHEEM ALJUNAIDI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: IT IS ORDERED THAT THE DEFAULT ENTERED ON OCTOBER 20, 2008 TO SET ASIDE AS TO DEFENDANTS YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC., DBA, YELLOW CAB YELLOW CAB COMPANY AND ABDULRAHEEM AHNMED ALJUNAIDI AND THAT SAID DEFENDANTS SHALL FILE THE ANSWER SUBMITTED WITH THEIR MOTION THIS DATE. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT THE PROVE-UP HEARING SET FOR JUNE 11, 2009 IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR, AND THE CASE SHALL BE THE SUBJECT OF A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FORTHWITH. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC., and, ABDULRAHEEM ALJUNAIDI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT. Appearances: Joseph M. Devine, Esq., of Kern, Noda, Devine & Segal, (415) 474-1900, appearing for Defendants and moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court's tentative is that: 1. Kim's declaration constitutes a showing of excusable neglect. 2. Plaintiff concedes untimely filing of his requisite statement of damages. Argued and the Court Rules as follows: It is Ordered that the default entered on October 20, 2008 to set aside as to Defendants Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc., DBA, Yellow Cab Yellow Cab Company and Abdulraheem Ahnmed Aljunaidi and that said defendants shall file the answer submitted with their motion this date. It is further Ordered that the prove-up hearing set for June 11, 2009 is ordered off calendar, and the case shall be the subject of a case management conference forthwith. Order signed in open Court.(302KOPP/PB)Judge: Quentin Kopp; Court Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR, 4280
